form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 520m. Last start finished 2nd on April 9 over 520m at this track behind Saja Boy beaten a neck (29.93) in a Grade 5. Has clocked a superb 29.69 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.
